'''Neic Norim''' was an old [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]]. He lost his right [[Limb/Legends|arm]] while working as a test pilot for [[SoroSuub Corporation/Legends|SoroSuub Corporation]] and switched professions to smuggling. He proved an adept smuggler and soon had a large network of paid [[Information broker/Legends|informants]] in the various [[Corellian/Legends|Corellian]] [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceports]]. He often used the [[Starship/Legends|ships]] of unsuspecting pilots to carry contraband, alerting his contact on the destination spaceport that a shipment was about to arrive. He became a successful enough smuggler to afford a [[Cybernetics/Legends|prosthetic arm]], a skeletal, gray-blue model without [[Synthflesh/Legends|synthflesh]]. Neic removed the sleeve of his [[combat jumpsuit]] to display his prosthetic prominently, feeling it boosted his image.<ref name="CCW" />

After a run-in with a [[loan shark]] and [[Agent/Legends|agents]] of [[Intra-Corellian Collections]], Neic escaped and took refuge in a network of abandoned underground tunnels on [[Selonia/Legends|Selonia]].<ref name="CCW" />
